replacements.originalText: Cursor
replacements.changeText: Cursor

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Chat Max Width
replacements.changeText: Cursor：聊天最大宽度

replacements.originalText: Controls the maximum width in pixels of chat content.
replacements.changeText: 控制聊天内容的最大宽度（像素）。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Code Tab Theme Diff Backgrounds
replacements.changeText: Cursor：代码 Tab 主题差异背景

replacements.originalText: Use themed background colors for inline diffs.
replacements.changeText: 为内联差异使用主题背景色。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Cmd K In Recent
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 最近使用 Cmd+K

replacements.originalText: Enable Cmd+K (Ctrl+K) shortcut for the selected Composer.
replacements.changeText: 为选中的 Composer 启用 Cmd+K（Ctrl+K）快捷键。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Diffusion
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 扩散

replacements.originalText: Controls how draft and side-file text edits are displayed and grouped in the Agent conversations.
replacements.changeText: 控制草稿和侧文件文本编辑在智能体对话中的显示与分组方式。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Custom Chime Sound Path
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 自定义提示音路径

replacements.originalText: Custom sound file (.mp3, .wav, .ogg) to play when agent finishes responding. Leave empty to use the default sound.
replacements.changeText: 智能体完成回复时播放的自定义音效文件（.mp3、.wav、.ogg）。留空则使用默认音效。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Inline Presentation Family
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 内联展示系列

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Max Window Size
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 最大窗口尺寸

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Queue Message Default Behavior
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 排队消息默认行为

replacements.originalText: Adjust the default behavior of sending a message while agent is responding.
replacements.changeText: 调整智能体回复期间发送消息的默认行为。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Should Auto Save Non-Agent
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 非智能体自动保存

replacements.originalText: Automatically save files in normal composer.
replacements.changeText: 在普通 Composer 中自动保存文件。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Should Chime After User Creates
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 用户创建后提示音

replacements.originalText: Play a sound when a chat response is complete.
replacements.changeText: 聊天回复完成时播放提示音。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Composer: Usage Summary Display
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Composer 用量摘要显示

replacements.originalText: When to display the usage summary at the bottom of the chat pane: automatically when approaching limits, always, or never.
replacements.changeText: 何时在聊天面板底部显示用量摘要：接近上限时自动、始终或从不。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Cpp: Disabled Languages
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Cpp 禁用语言

replacements.originalText: Disable Cursor Tab for these languages.
replacements.changeText: 对这些语言禁用 Cursor Tab。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Cpp: Enable Partial Accepts
replacements.changeText: Cursor：Cpp 启用部分接受

replacements.originalText: Enable partial accepts for Cursor Tab, using the arrow keys to accept words/lines without committing.
replacements.changeText: 为 Cursor Tab 启用部分接受，使用方向键接受单词/行而不提交。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: General: Enable Http2
replacements.changeText: Cursor：常规 启用 HTTP/2

replacements.originalText: Enable HTTP/2 for the agent chat. This increases resource utilization and latency, but is useful if you're behind a corporate proxy that does not support HTTP/1.1 for streaming responses.
replacements.changeText: 为智能体聊天启用 HTTP/2。会增加资源占用和延迟，但适用于不支持 HTTP/1.1 流式响应的企业代理环境。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: General: Git Index Indexing
replacements.changeText: Cursor：常规 Git 索引

replacements.originalText: Index your git history to help Cursor understand which files are related to each other.
replacements.changeText: 索引 Git 历史，帮助 Cursor 理解文件之间的关联。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Terminal: Enable Ai Checks
replacements.changeText: Cursor：终端 启用 AI 检测

replacements.originalText: AI-based Terminal Completion Detection.
replacements.changeText: 基于 AI 的终端完成检测。

replacements.originalText: Cursor: Terminal: Live Preview Box
replacements.changeText: Cursor：终端 实时预览框

replacements.originalText: Use a preview box for terminal chat. If turned off, responses are streamed directly into the chat.
replacements.changeText: 为终端聊天使用预览框。关闭后，回复将直接流式输出到聊天中。

replacements.originalText: Add Item
replacements.changeText: 添加项
